positive: Stylized abstract geometric pattern featuring interconnected natural elements: minimalist mountain peaks, flowing river lines, delicate leaf vein structures, and stylized solar rays. The pattern should form a cohesive, continuous tapestry suitable for repeating print. Use a limited, earthy palette of deep sage green, terracotta orange, muted slate blue, and cream off-white. Composition must be balanced, symmetrical, and strongly centered, with clean, sharp silhouettes and high contrast against a subtle, slightly textured background. Intricate line art style, vector illustration quality, ideal for apparel printing, flat lay presentation, top-down view, graphic design.
negative: blurry, artifacts, low detail, text, watermark, signature, logo, messy, photographic, photo, gradient, grain, noisy, bad anatomy, extra limbs
